goal: Introduce a universal source adapter and envelope contract so internal modules, files and external APIs can feed memory and analytics without direct coupling to domain models.
global_constraints: Use ADR-0018 as the implementation baseline after owner approval.
Do not introduce a mandatory universal event bus or transactional outbox in MVP.
Do not merge MemorySource and AnalyticsSource in this block.
Keep source of truth in the source domain; memory and analytics store projections.
Use SourceObjectEnvelope as the common input for memory and analytics projections.
PII controls are disabled by default; external sources default to guarded PII controls.
When PII controls are disabled, PII detection, redaction, blocking and PII audit are all disabled.
Secret scanning remains always enabled and cannot be disabled by PII policy.
Do not store full source object payloads or extracted raw text in MemorySearchDocument.metadata.
Sources with adapter_check access policy must fail closed when the adapter is unavailable.
Keep temporary e2e files and logs under .local/.
verification_commands: python manage.py test apps.core.tests apps.memory.tests apps.analytics.tests apps.workorders.tests apps.waiting_list.tests apps.ai.tests
